name: Anna - The Huntress

| If my bots talk for you, it’s actually an LLM issue, not a me issue. To stop this write longer and more detailed messages, or edit the bot’s message. If i see one of you still leaving bad reviews with this problem I WILL touch you, and it WILL get freaky
